selection.status_reason: Live thesis monitor refreshed the active weekly pick.

reasons: Price trend remains constructive: 5-day momentum is 8.2% and 20-day momentum is 14.6%.
Trend quality is supported by 80% positive sessions over the last 10 trading days and the price sitting 11.3% relative to its 20-day average.
Risk profile shows daily volatility around 2.2%, downside volatility near 2.0%, and a recent max drawdown of 6.9%.
Volume confirmation is -11.8% versus the trailing baseline, which helps separate steady breakouts from thin momentum.
Relative strength is 5.9% versus SPY over 5 days and 8.9% versus the sector ETF.
News signal is bullish with score 0.80, confidence 0.74, and 0.3 weighted articles across 2 sources.
GPT-5 article classification and company-news provider coverage rated the news flow bullish at 0.80, after adjusting for relevance, recency, source quality, and story concentration.
Evidence quality: 2 articles across 2 sources, 0.3 effective weighted articles, average relevance 0.55, average source quality 0.75, confidence 0.74.
Technical weights were calibrated on 2303 historical symbol-weeks against 5-day excess return (IC -0.02).
Overall model score is 0.227 with high confidence.

news_evidence.title: China will open doors wider, Xi tells US CEOs accompanying Trump
news_evidence.llm_reason: Comments from Xi about opening China are macro/sector-level but relevant to Tesla because China is a major market and manufacturing base (Gigafactory Shanghai). Could boost near-term sentiment and sales expectations if perceived as easing trade/tension, but the piece appears broad and not company-specific, so impact is modest and short-term.
